args.query: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName, p.Description FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE o.AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'

exec_args.sql: SELECT o.Id as OrderId, o.AccountId, o.EffectiveDate, oi.Id as OrderItemId, oi.Product2Id, p.Name as ProductName, p.Description FROM "Order" o JOIN OrderItem oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId JOIN Product2 p ON oi.Product2Id = p.Id WHERE o.AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND o.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND o.EffectiveDate < '2021-07-01'
